div.div:
Traffic Flow: ❶ PGA enabled on subnet ❷ DNS resolves *.run.app → 199.36.153.4/30 (restricted VIP) ❸ PGA routes traffic over Google backbone ❹ Cloud Run receives request
Pros: Simplest setup, lowest cost (~$0.20/mo), no per-service infra, auto-scales, no VPN dependency
Cons: No custom domains (run.app only), limited traffic management, no path-based routing
